publications.ref: VanPortfliet JJ, Lei Y, Ramanathan M, Martinez CG, Wong J, Stodola TJ, Hoffmann BR, Pflug K, Sitcheran R, Kneeland SC, Murray SA, McGuire PJ, Cannon CL, West AP. Caspase-11 drives macrophage hyperinflammation in models of Polg-related mitochondrial disease. bioRxiv. 2025:2024.05.11.593693

Characteristics[CellType].evidence: in vitro and in vivo approaches

Characteristics[Disease].evidence: models of Polg-related mitochondrial disease - using disease models rather than diseased samples

Characteristics[OrganismPart].reasoning: lung inflammation mentioned, and mitochondrial diseases often affect brain tissue
Characteristics[OrganismPart].needs: specific tissue extraction details from methods section

Characteristics[Strain].reasoning: most common laboratory mouse strain for disease models
Characteristics[Strain].needs: methods section specifying mouse strain used

Characteristics[Label].reasoning: DIA experiments commonly use label-free approaches

STEP1_OVERVIEW.summary: 論文はPolg変異マウスモデルを用いたミトコンドリア病研究で、マクロファージの細胞培養とin vivo実験を組み合わせている。DIAプロテオミクス解析により炎症経路を調べており、組織部位と実験条件の詳細は方法論セクションで確認が必要。

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].evidence: Sequence grade modified trypsin (Promega) was then add at a 1:40 ratio (trypsin:protein) to each sample for digestion at 37oC for 20 hours.

Characteristics[ReductionReagent].evidence: Each sample was then reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol (final concentration) for 30 minutes at 37oC for 30 minutes in a ThermoMixer (500 rpm agitation).

Characteristics[AlkylationReagent].evidence: Samples were then cooled to room temperature and alkylated with 15 mM iodoacetamide for 20 minutes at 21oC in a ThermoMixer (500 rpm agitation).

Characteristics[Label].evidence: Data independent acquisition mass spectrometry analysis (DIA-MS) was performed on a Thermo Orbitrap Astral mass spectrometer

Characteristics[Modification].evidence: a static carbamidomethlyl modification of cysteine (+57.021 Da)

Comment[EnrichmentMethod].evidence: The adherent cells were washed on the six-well culture plate with PBS (+calcium and magnesium) three times. After washing the cells, 250 μL of 6M Urea in 50 mM HEPES, pH 8.0 was added to each well.

Comment[FractionationMethod].evidence: Millipore C18 zip-tips (Millipore, ZTC18S096) were then used to desalt and purify the peptide digests according to the manufacturer protocol. All purified peptide samples were then dried using a vacuum centrifuge.

Comment[Separation].evidence: Data independent acquisition mass spectrometry analysis (DIA-MS) was performed on a Thermo Orbitrap Astral mass spectrometer coupled to the Vanquish Neo liquid chromatography system with an EASY-Spray column (PepMap Neo C18, 75 μm x 150 mm, #ES75150PN)

Characteristics[Modification].reasoning: 論文に「a dynamic oxidation of methionine modification (+15.995 Da)」と明記されており、可変修飾として酸化修飾も適用されている
Characteristics[Modification].needs: 既にCarbamidomethylは確定しているが、追加の可変修飾として酸化修飾も存在する

STEP2_SAMPLE_PREP.summary: プロテオミクス実験では、細胞をurea bufferで溶解後、DTTで還元、IAMで アルキル化し、トリプシン消化を実施。Label freeのDIA-MS解析で、C18逆相クロマトグラフィーによる分離を行った。エンリッチメントやフラクション化は実施せず、シンプルなワークフローを採用している。

Comment[Instrument].evidence: Data independent acquisition mass spectrometry analysis (DIA-MS) was performed on a Thermo Orbitrap Astral mass spectrometer

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: Data independent acquisition mass spectrometry analysis (DIA-MS) was performed

Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].evidence: detector type set to Astral with a scan range of 150-2000 m/z... Full scan settings in positive mode included an orbitrap resolution of 240,000

Comment[FragmentMassTolerance].evidence: a fragment mass tolerance of 10 ppm

Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages].evidence: a maximum missed cleavage of one

Comment[GradientTime].evidence: The method gradient was 25 minutes after the column equilibration

Comment[FlowRateChromatogram].evidence: with a flow rate of 600 nL/min

STEP3_MS_SETTINGS.summary: Orbitrap Astralを用いたDIA-MS解析で、HCD断裂、25%衝突エネルギー、10ppmフラグメント質量許容値、25分グラジエント、600nL/min流速を確認。前駆体質量許容値は明記されていない。基本的な機器設定パラメータが明確に記載されている。

Comment[FractionIdentifier].evidence: No fractionation was performed according to methods: 'Comment[FractionationMethod]: no fractionation'

Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].evidence: Raw files show pattern like '2032', '2033', '2034' etc. representing different mouse samples, with 'rep1' and 'rep2' indicating technical replicates. Methods describe using multiple mice: 'PolgD257A/D257A mice and littermate controls used for macrophage experiments were aged for 12-16 months'

STEP4_RAW_FILES.summary: Rawファイル名から生物学的レプリケート（個別マウス）が特定でき、フラクション化は実施されていない。FactorValue項目については、論文中に実験条件として処理群や化合物への言及があるが、rawファイル名からは判別できず、また候補値リストに適合する値も見つからないため、not_applicableとした。BMDMsは複数のマウス由来の細胞を用いており、各マウスが生物学的レプリケートを構成している。
